top_signals.title: Short line rail hits T&I truck benefits, costly safety mandates
top_signals.summary:
An industry trade group says the new surface transportation legislation offers some rail-positive provisions, but expressed disappointment at inclusions favoring heavier trucks and expensive safety mandates.   

The post Short line rail hits T&I truck benefits, costly safety mandates appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
